Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}All we need is your signature, so read through this and sign here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}You can leave the rest to me. Good luck in student council.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You now have access to the student council room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Don't tell me you're bored, {f 4 1}-kun. Take advantage of your youth while you still have it.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Before you know it, you'll be grown up, you won't have any time for yourself, you'll never settle down with a nice man...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I listened to Ms. Toriumi rant for as[n]long as I could before slipping out.[n]{f 1 1}
